title: Look Closer
subtitle: Same ground, smaller worlds
intro: You found the easy-to-spot life last time. Now shrink your search -- the busiest hunters and builders around you are smaller than your thumb.
outro: You just ran a survey at bug scale, and that's a real field technique. Keep logging -- new expeditions appear as your Dex grows.

steps.hint: Lift a rock or a piece of bark, take the photo, then put it back the way you found it.
Follow the webs -- fence corners, window frames, the gaps between plant stems.

steps.description: Find a plant that's new to your Dex
Find the smallest living thing you can photograph clearly
